targets.expr: up{}*100 or relational_store_is_healthy*100

sum by (job, serviceName, serviceType, operation, username) (rate(requests_failed_total{job=~"$job",serviceType=~"$serviceType",serviceName=~"$serviceName",operation=~"$operation",username=~"$username"}[5m]))/ sum by (job, serviceName, serviceType, operation, username) (rate(requests_total{job=~"$job",serviceType=~"$serviceType",serviceName=~"$serviceName",operation=~"$operation",username=~"$username"}[5m]))*100>0

panels.title: Avg Response Time by Service, User, Operation (s)

targets.expr: topk(10, sum by (job,serviceName) (rate(requests_wait_time_seconds_sum{folderName=~"$folderName",serviceName=~"$serviceName"}[5m]))  / sum by (job, serviceName) (rate ( requests_wait_time_seconds_count{folderName=~"$folderName",serviceName=~"$serviceName"}[5m])))>0

topk(10, sum by (job, serviceType) (rate(requests_response_time_seconds_bucket{le="0.5", job=~"$job",folderName=~"$folderName",serviceType=~"$serviceType", operation=~"^.+$"}[5m]))  / sum by (job,serviceType) (rate ( requests_response_time_seconds_count{job=~"$job",folderName=~"$folderName",serviceType=~"$serviceType",serviceName=~"$serviceName",operation=~"$operation", operation=~"^.+$"}[5m])))*100>0

topk(50, sum by (job, serviceType) (rate(requests_response_time_seconds_bucket{le="1.0", job=~"$job",serviceType=~"$serviceType", operation=~"^.+$"}[5m]))  / sum by (job,serviceType) (rate ( requests_response_time_seconds_count{job=~"$job",serviceType=~"$serviceType",serviceName=~"$serviceName",operation=~"$operation",operation=~"^.+$"}[5m])))*100>0

topk(50, sum by (job, serviceType) (rate(requests_response_time_seconds_bucket{le="10.0", job=~"$job",folderName=~"$folderName",serviceType=~"$serviceType"}[5m]))  / sum by (job,serviceType) (rate ( requests_response_time_seconds_count{job=~"$job",folderName=~"$folderName",serviceType=~"$serviceType",serviceName=~"$serviceName",operation=~"$operation",operation=~"^.+$"}[5m])))*100>0

panels.title: User Load: Service Requests Per Second

targets.expr: topk(50,sum by (job, serviceName, serviceType) (rate( requests_total{job=~"$job",folderName=~"$folderName",serviceType=~"$serviceType",serviceName=~"$serviceName",operation=~"$operation", operation=~"^.+$"}[5m])))>0

topk(10,sum by (job, username) (rate(requests_total{job=~"$job",folderName=~"$folderName",serviceType=~"$serviceType",serviceName=~"$serviceName",operation=~"$operation",username=~"$username", operation=~"^.+$"}[5m])))>0

topk(10,sum by (job,appType, serviceName, username, operation) (rate(requests_total{job=~"$job",folderName=~"$folderName",serviceType=~"$serviceType",serviceName=~"$serviceName",operation=~"$operation",username=~"$username", operation=~"^.+$"}[5m])))>0

topk(10,sum by (job, serviceName, serviceType) (rate( requests_response_time_seconds_sum{job=~"$job",folderName=~"$folderName",serviceType=~"$serviceType",serviceName=~"$serviceName",operation=~"$operation",operation=~"^.+$"}[5m])))>0

topk(50,sum by (job, username) (rate(requests_response_time_seconds_counter_total{job=~"$job",folderName=~"$folderName",serviceType=~"$serviceType",serviceName=~"$serviceName",operation=~"$operation",username=~"$username", operation=~"^.+$"}[5m])))>0

topk(50,sum by (job,serviceName, username, operation) (rate(requests_response_time_seconds_counter_total{job=~"$job",folderName=~"$folderName",serviceType=~"$serviceType",serviceName=~"$serviceName",operation=~"$operation",username=~"$username", operation=~"^.+$"}[5m])))>0

panels.title: Total Time Used by Service, User, Operation (s/s)
CPU Used  (cores) by Service, Pod, Node
Memory Used  (B) by Service, Pod, Node

targets.expr: sum by (label_arcgis_gis_service_name) ( kube_pod_status_phase{namespace="arcgis",phase="Running"}   * on(namespace, pod) group_left(label_arcgis_gis_service_name)   kube_pod_labels{ namespace="arcgis",label_arcgis_gis_service_name!=""} )>0

100 - (
  avg by (job,instance) (
    rate(node_cpu_seconds_total{mode="idle"}[1m])
  )
  * on(instance)
    group_left(nodename)
    max by (instance, nodename) (node_uname_info)
  * 100
)

100 * (
  1 - (
    node_memory_MemAvailable_bytes
    / node_memory_MemTotal_bytes
    * on (instance)
      group_left(nodename)
      max by (instance, nodename) (node_uname_info)
  )
)

sum by (job, instance, nodename) (
  rate(node_cpu_seconds_total{mode!="idle"}[1m])
  * on (instance)
    group_left (nodename)
    max by (job, instance, nodename) (node_uname_info)
)

(
  node_memory_MemTotal_bytes
  - node_memory_MemAvailable_bytes
)
/
1024 / 1024 / 1024
* on (instance)
  group_left (nodename)
  max by (instance, nodename) (node_uname_info)

panels.description:
High value means the container is frequently throttled.
This indicates CPU starvation, which can degrade performance.
Consider: Increase CPU limits, Optimize workload, Use autoscaling.

defaults.noValue: Healthy. No pods restarted during this time interval.

panels.title: CPU Throttling Rate by ArcGIS Service and Pod

targets.expr:
(
  avg by (job,instance) (
    rate(node_cpu_seconds_total{node=~"$nodeName", mode="idle"}[1m])
  )
  * on(instance)
    group_left(nodename)
    max by (job, instance, nodename) (node_uname_info)
  * 100
)

panels.description:
High value means the container is frequently throttled.
This indicates CPU starvation, which can degrade performance.
Consider: Increase CPU limits, Optimize workload, Use autoscaling.

defaults.noValue: Healthy. No pods restarted during this time interval.

panels.title: CPU Usage as % of Container CPU Limit (ArcGIS Services)

defaults.noValue: Healthy. No pods restarted during this time interval.

panels.description:
High value means the container is frequently throttled.
This indicates CPU starvation, which can degrade performance.
Consider: Increase CPU limits, Optimize workload, Use autoscaling.

defaults.noValue: Healthy. No pods restarted during this time interval.

panels.title: Memory Usage as % of Container Memory Limit (ArcGIS Services)

targets.expr: sum(kube_pod_container_resource_limits{namespace=~"arcgis",node=~"$nodeName",pod=~"$pod",resource="cpu",}) by (pod, namespace, node)
sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests{namespace=~"arcgis",node=~"$nodeName",pod=~"$pod", resource="memory"}) by (pod, namespace, node)
sum(kube_pod_container_resource_limits{namespace="arcgis",node=~"$nodeName",pod=~"$pod", resource="memory"}) by (pod, namespace, node)
sum(rate(container_cpu_usage_seconds_total{namespace="arcgis",container="main-container",node=~"$nodeName",pod=~"$pod"}[5m])) by (pod, namespace, node)
sum(container_memory_working_set_bytes{image!="", container!="",namespace="arcgis",node=~"$nodeName",pod=~"$pod"}) by (pod, namespace, node)

title: ArcGIS Enterprise 12.1 on Kubernetes: System Diagnostics
